right_target.finding: Strong genetic link. OpenTargets returns 977 melanoma evidence rows for TERT (ENSG00000164362), including a cancer_gene_census somatic_mutation record and multiple maximum-score (score=1.0) europepmc literature associations (resourceScore up to 204; PMIDs 28378855, 29695835, 29262649). GWAS returns 50 SNPs mapped to TERT, all at the 5p15.33 locus (e.g. rs145613323, rs37004, rs79784189) — the chromosomal region of the famous recurrent TERT promoter mutations in melanoma.
right_target.provenance: ToolUniverse OpenTargets_get_evidence_by_datasource (gene=TERT, disease=melanoma; 977 evidences) + gwas_get_snps_for_gene (gene=TERT; 50 SNPs, all 5p15.33)

right_tissue.finding: CellMarker returns 4 human records for TERT as a cell marker: 2 Cancer cell records (Brain, Lung) and 2 Normal cell records (both Embryonic stem cell, Embryo/Undefined tissue). No dedicated melanoma/skin tissue record. Consistent with telomerase reactivation being a pan-cancer feature rather than melanoma-tissue-specific.

right_safety.finding: CellMarker flags TERT expression in Normal cells — specifically embryonic/embryonic stem cells (2 of 4 records), the physiological telomerase-active compartment, indicating on-target liability in stem/germline-like cells. No approved TERT-directed drug exists, so OpenFDA_search_drug_events has no relevant product to query for post-market adverse events.
right_safety.provenance: ToolUniverse CellMarker_search_by_gene normal-cell records (2 Embryonic stem cell); OpenFDA_search_drug_events not run — no marketed TERT drug

right_patient.finding: No melanoma clinical trials found for a TERT/telomerase intervention. search_clinical_trials returned 'No studies found' for both intervention=TERT/condition=melanoma and intervention=telomerase/condition=melanoma. Despite strong target genetics, there is no TERT drug in the clinic for this indication.
right_patient.provenance: ToolUniverse search_clinical_trials (intervention=TERT + telomerase, condition=melanoma) returned status=error 'No studies found'

right_commercial.finding: No antibody therapeutics against TERT: Thera-SAbDab returns count=0 (empty therapeutics list). No melanoma clinical-trial assets found. TERT (intracellular reverse transcriptase) is not an antibody-tractable target and shows no competitive commercial pipeline in this datasource.

tractability.finding: Pharos classifies TERT as Tchem (has small-molecule ligands with activity data but not yet a clinical drug target), family=Enzyme, UniProt O14746. Novelty is very low (0.00024) with 2051 publications and 2051-count literature — a heavily studied, well-precedented but not clinically drugged target. Weak/incomplete tractability: chemical matter exists but no approved therapeutic.
tractability.provenance: ToolUniverse Pharos_get_target (gene=TERT; tdl=Tchem, fam=Enzyme, novelty=0.00024411, publicationCount=2051)
